chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – The urine of the animals and their droppings

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/161)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/161)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) اغْسِلْ ثَوْبَكَ مِنْ أَبْوَالِ مَا لَا يُؤْكَلُ لَحْمُهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Wash your clothes from the urines for that whose flesh cannot be eaten’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Wash your clothes because of the urine of inedible animals.’”
